name: Rank-Up-Magic Numeron Force
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ヌメロン・フォース
desc: Target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster with the same Type as that monster you control, but 1 Rank higher, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to it also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.) Then, if any face-up cards are on the field other than this card and the monster Summoned by it, negate the effects of those other cards.
eff: Target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Number C" monster with the same Type as that monster you control, but 1 Rank higher, by using it as the Xyz Material. (This Special Summon is treated as an Xyz Summon. Xyz Materials attached to it also become Xyz Materials on the Summoned monster.) Then, if any face-up cards are on the field other than this card and the monster Summoned by it, negate the effects of those other cards.

sets.set: Premium Gold: Return of the Bling

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
